base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of inventory_items — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1996 resident evil. Inventory item icons — Herbs (G/R/B + combined G+R, G+G+B, etc.) + keys + weapons icons + ink ribbons + documents. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Inventory item icons — Herbs (G/R/B + combined G+R, G+G+B, etc.) + keys + weapons icons + ink ribbons + documents
